criteria.name: MOM completeness
criteria.description: The MOM captures meeting context, decisions, action items, owners, blockers, and detailed discussion.

criteria.name: Actionability
criteria.description: Todo items are concise, clearly owned, and immediately actionable.

criteria.name: Narrative fidelity
criteria.description: The MOM preserves the actual shape of the meeting with clear acts, grounded quotes, and useful timestamps.

criteria.name: Context discipline
criteria.description: The skill keeps one meeting at a time in scope and separates extraction from final artifact writing.
